name: What if my employer doesn't have workers comp insurance?

mainEntity.name: What if my employer doesn't have workers comp insurance?

acceptedAnswer.text: You're still entitled to benefits. Utah and Idaho require employers to carry coverage or be self-insured. If uninsured, the state Uninsured Employer Fund covers your medical and wage loss.
